mentions.note: Low multiple appeal but Cramer prefers Viking Cruises (VKG) long-term; Viking offers better 5-year outlook; Carnival reasonable hold but not best-in-class.
Oil-sensitive stock caught in dangerous geopolitical trading trap on Iran peace rumors; Cramer warns against speculative trading without edge; prefer Viking for long-term hold.
Cruise lines first battered, first to recover as bargain vacations; ceasefire fuels travel rebound optimism.
Down 3%; cruise line weakness adds to consumer spending concerns across discretionary categories.

Cruise lines strong now but trip cancellations coming; war redirecting ships, impacting ocean travel logistics; watch earnings Friday for guidance clarity.
